description:
You have received a search warrant return containing a suspect's cloud storage files. Unlike a raw disk image, these are loose logical files. Create a forensic case named 'Cloud_Return_2024' (case number 'INV-CLD-001') and ingest the logical evidence from /home/ga/evidence/Cloud_Return/ using only 'Hash Lookup' (MD5) and 'File Type Identification' modules. Generate a tab-delimited file catalog of all regular files at /home/ga/Reports/logical_catalog.tsv with the header: FILENAME\tPATH\tSIZE\tMD5\tMIME_TYPE. Write a summary to /home/ga/Reports/cloud_summary.txt containing the total file count, the count of 'image/jpeg' files, and the count of 'text/plain' files using the following format:
TOTAL_FILES: <N>
JPEG_IMAGES: <N>
TEXT_FILES: <N>
